overall.description: A cinematic scene from the video game Hogwarts Legacy, showing the interior of The Three Broomsticks tavern. The player character stands in the warm, firelit main hall with wooden medieval architecture while NPC patrons sit at tables nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern main hall with upper balcony

events.description: interaction prompt icon briefly appears at bottom center of screen indicating available player action
player character raises right arm toward head in idle animation gesture

agents.ego_description: standing still in the tavern main hall, occasionally shifting weight and looking around the room

notable_agents.action: two patrons seated at wooden table engaged in conversation
figure standing on upper balcony overlooking the main hall

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with warm glowing fire providing primary illumination
second floor wooden balcony with railing spanning the width of the room
large circular wagon wheel chandelier with candles hanging from ceiling beams
wooden tavern sign with gold lettering mounted on the balcony front
rustic wooden tables and benches arranged throughout the dining area
framed artwork and portraits decorating the wooden wall panels

segments.scene_description: The player character stands in the warm, dimly lit interior of The Three Broomsticks tavern, a medieval-style establishment with heavy wooden beams, a stone fireplace glowing in the background, and an upper balcony level. NPC patrons sit at tables to the right while the camera remains mostly stationary, capturing the atmospheric firelight and rustic decor. A brief interaction icon appears mid-segment, and the character raises an arm in an idle animation toward the end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, atmospheric gaze within the warm, dimly lit interior of The Three Broomsticks tavern. It begins with a focus on the rustic medieval architecture, where heavy wooden beams and a glowing stone fireplace establish a cozy, firelit mood. As the camera lingers, the scene expands to reveal NPC patrons seated at tables to the right and an upper balcony level overlooking the main hall. The perspective remains mostly stationary, observing the interplay of light and shadow across the decor before concluding as the character raises an arm in a subtle idle animation.
